creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #8)

>* please refrain from reassigning things – without question – 
>  to my @freebsd.org identity.

I'll do what I need to do from a point of view of triage. Since you did not provide *any* reasons as to why you removed yourself from the assignee, I didn't really sea a reason to ask you if I could assign it to you.

Just so you know, I do this for *every* developer. None have complained.
